name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Bug fix: critical error on Square settings save form. General settings handler no longer fires on non-general tabs.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.15: Fixed extras not displaying after save — SQL error in get_booking_items_by_room used wrong column name (room_sync_id vs room_id). Extras now save and display correctly.
  • 1.9.2.14: Fixed extras not saving — root cause was PHP parse error from single-quoted console.log inside echo that killed the entire file before form handler could run. Removed debug noise.
  • 1.9.2.13: Debug: added wp_die(var_export($_POST)) in form handler to diagnose pending_items not saving.
  • 1.9.2.12: Fixed JavaScript syntax error in extras functionality — console.log statements with single quotes were conflicting with PHP echo statement quotes, causing parse error on booking detail page.
  • 1.9.2.11: Fixed critical error on Square settings save — general settings handler was incorrectly triggered on all tabs, and missing argument in update_option() caused crash.
  • 1.9.2.10: Square Terminal payments — add API credentials in Settings → Square Payments, then 'Pay with Square Terminal' button on booking detail page. Auto-creates IN invoice on payment confirmation. New DB columns: payment_status, payment_method, square_checkout_id.
